evidence.description: next_available_note_id pure pub fn: base = format_base_id(now_ms); if !existing.contains(&base) return base; loop -N until non-collision.

compose_initial_snapshot_with_autocreate constructs existing_ids from lowercase stems, prepends new_id to visible_note_ids, inserts new metadata, sets editing.status=editing, current_note_id=Some(new_id), pending_next_focus=None, cause=InitialLoad.

feed_initial_state validates vault_path (read_dir → map_err), calls scan_vault_feed, reads SystemTime::now() into now_ms, delegates to compose_initial_snapshot_with_autocreate. EARS first-call discipline is delegated to +page.svelte per spec Resolution FIND-S5-SPEC-003 (line 920).
DomainSnapshotReceived mirrors editing.status → editingStatus, editing.currentNoteId → editingNoteId, editing.pendingNextFocus → pendingNextFocus (REQ-FEED-029).
All 8 Sprint 5 cargo tests + 4 TS feedReducer.sprint5 tests PASS; CRIT-S5-001 / CRIT-S5-004 / CRIT-S5-007 named tests confirmed in log lines 17-44.

Three vault-scan-semantics edge-case tests: dot-file exclusion (test_feed_initial_state_excludes_dot_md_files), symlink exclusion (test_feed_initial_state_excludes_symlink_md_files #[cfg(unix)]), non-recursive scan (test_feed_initial_state_ignores_subdirectory_md_files).
Collision -1 and -2 suffix edge cases tested via fixed Clock (test_next_available_note_id_collision_suffix).

format_base_id uses Hinnant Z algorithm — pure, deterministic, no SystemTime/fs/RNG. Algorithm traced for now_ms=0 → '1970-01-01-000000-000' and now_ms=1577836800000 → '2020-01-01-000000-000', matching TS formatBaseId (initialize-capture.ts:112-126) which uses new Date().getUTC*().
next_available_note_id: no SystemTime/fs/RNG/println; takes &HashSet<String> by reference; termination bound is existing.len()+1 iterations (proven by spec PROP-FEED-S5-002).

scan_vault_feed Sprint 5 semantics: dot-file filter (line 408-414), file_type().is_file() symlink/dir filter (line 416), case-insensitive .md extension via eq_ignore_ascii_case (line 421). All 3 grep patterns from CRIT-S5-005 confirmed: one hit each.
EditingSubDto carries pending_next_focus: Option<PendingNextFocusDto> (NOT pending_next_note_id). PendingNextFocusDto defined in editor.rs:47-53 with note_id + block_id fields.

Sprint 4 compose_select_past_note path intact: parse_markdown_to_blocks + compose_state_for_select_past_note unchanged; Sprint 5 code added without disturbing this code path. Regression covered by prop_s4_017 and the 7 PROP-FEED-S4-* tests passing in green log.
Quality gate summary: cargo-test-feed-handlers=27, bun-test=1813, cargo-clippy=0 warnings (-D warnings), cargo-fmt=diff 0.
Post-fix totals: cargo 160 PASS (80 unit + 18 editor + 22 note_body_editor + 30 feed_handlers + 10 note_body_editor_handlers), bun 1813 PASS, clippy/fmt clean.
Clean structural separation: compose_initial_snapshot_with_autocreate (pure orchestration), feed_initial_state (effectful shell). Matches contract CRIT-S5-007 grep requirement.

test_next_available_note_id_non_collision_property uses proptest macro with strategies now_ms ∈ 0i64..253_402_300_800_000i64 (per PROP-FEED-S5-003 domain) and existing in hash_set('[a-zA-Z0-9\-]{1,40}', 0..=1023) (per PROP-FEED-S5-002 |existing|<1024 bound).
test_next_available_note_id_format uses regex ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{6}-\d{3}$ — matches TS canonical format (initialize-capture.ts:125 backtick template).

test_next_available_note_id_ts_parity_snapshot covers all 4 named cases: base (2020-01-01 00:00:00), -1 collision, -10 collision, Unix epoch (now_ms=0 → 1970-01-01-000000-000). Expected values traced manually against TS formatBaseId via new Date(epochMillis).getUTC*().
